hero.badge: No.1 Approved Secondhand Furniture Buyer in Madinah
hero.title: We Purchase Secondhand Furniture & Home Appliances
hero.highlight: at the Highest Cash Payout Rates in Madinah!
hero.description: Looking to upgrade your home or trade in heavy wood bedrooms, luxury sofas, GCC modular majlas, split & window ACs, double fridges, washing machines, or custom steel kitchens? We promise honest evaluation, instant hard cash before loading, and 100% free technical disassembly & truck towing!
hero.ctaCall: Call MD Sabuj Miah Directly Now

categories.title: Major Items & Appliances We Buy
categories.subtitle: Explore our primary focus trade categories. We guarantee fair quotes without buying pressure

list.name: Bedrooms & closets
list.desc: We purchase complete master bedroom sets, children's bed layouts, multi-door closets, and makeup dressers.

list.name: Sofas & Arabic majlas
list.desc: We buy large room L-shape sofas, classic GCC style corner majlas sets, wool carpets, and window drapes.

list.name: Appliances & AC units
list.desc: We buy split & window ACs, large fridges, washing machines, dishwashers, and microwave ovens.

list.name: Modular kitchen cabinets
list.desc: We buy aluminum and sturdy wood custom kitchens, cabinets, and steel sinks with free removal.

howItWorks.title: Liquidate Your Old Furniture in 3 Steps
howItWorks.subtitle: Easy, quick, and stress-free. We handle everything from hard lifting to free transport

steps.title: Call us or text photos of items
steps.description: Give us a direct cell call or send snapshots of your bedrooms, sofas, kitchen, or AC appliances on WhatsApp for an immediate baseline estimate.

steps.title: Real-time, trustworthy valuation
steps.description: Our rep visits your residence in Madinah within 60 minutes for a quick physical appraisal, offering you the absolute highest trade value.

steps.title: Instant cash payment & removal
steps.description: We hand over the full agreed amount dynamically in cash, and then our on-board carpenter dismantles and loads everything safely.

productsSection.title: Samples of Items We Recently Purchased in Madina
productsSection.subtitle: Take a look at actual item photos and transaction price ranges we happily settled with our valued clients

products.title: Classic Luxury Wood Bedroom Sets & Closets
products.specs: Heavy structural beechwood • 6 to 8 Piece layout
products.desc: Purchased from clean residential apartments in Madinah containing complete bed sizes, side drawers, mirror dresser vanity and 6-door storage closets.

products.title: Secondhand Split & Window AC units in Madina
products.specs: 18,000 - 24,000 BTU • Carrier, LG, Gree & Beko brands
products.desc: We buy functional and non-functional split and window air conditioners. We provide totally free unbolting, pipe unmounting, and transport.

products.title: Double-Door Samsung & Toshiba Refrigerators
products.specs: Multi Size • 14 to 22 Cubic Feet Frost Free models
products.desc: Purchased refrigerator cooling units in premium running state. We evaluate the compressor and shelves honestly, paying higher than anyone.

products.title: Turkish Modern Living Rooms & Arabic Majlas
products.specs: Complete assembly • Seats up to 12 persons with rugs
products.desc: We buy high-end modular sofas, Turkish upholstery, floor pillows, rugs, and custom curtains. We pay premium quotes for clean fabrics & thick foams.

products.title: Ready-Made Aluminum Kitchen Cabinet Suites
products.specs: 3 to 5 meter long with steel sink & countertop
products.desc: Acquired sturdy and beautifully fitted modular aluminum/wood kitchens. Our wood carpenters handle clean de-installation without damaging walls.

products.title: Automatic & Semi Washing Drums & Tents
products.specs: 7 to 12 KG loading size • Top & Front loaders
products.desc: We seek out automatic washing cylinders, dryers, and commercial kitchen dishwashers. Quick and certified inspection with instant cash delivery.

products.title: Premium Five-Burner Stainless Steel Ovens
products.specs: Safety valves • Glemgas & Turkish high models
products.desc: We obtain stainless steel stove tops, gas stoves, built-in ovens and microwave heating ovens. We estimate burner conditions fairly.
